title: Squirrel Removal in Crown Heights, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Crown Heights, Brooklyn. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Serving brownstones & apartments. Call for fast service!
intro: Crown Heights residents dealing with squirrels in attics, walls, or rooflines need expert wildlife removal services. Our experienced technicians provide humane squirrel trapping, complete exclusion work, and damage restoration throughout Crown Heights, Brooklyn. We serve the historic brownstones, multi-family homes, and apartment buildings across this vibrant neighborhood.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been protecting Crown Heights properties from squirrel infestations for years with proven humane removal methods and guaranteed results. Our licensed technicians respond quickly, understand the unique architecture of Crown Heights homes, and provide comprehensive solutions that prevent squirrels from returning.
localContext: Crown Heights' beautiful pre-war brownstones and tree-lined streets along Eastern Parkway and surrounding areas provide ideal habitats for squirrels seeking entry into attics and eaves. The neighborhood's mix of historic residential buildings and proximity to Prospect Park means squirrel activity is common, making professional exclusion services essential for protecting your property.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Crown Heights?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Crown Heights typically range from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, complete exclusion work to seal entry points, and sanitation. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before starting any work.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Crown Heights brownstones and homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter Crown Heights homes through roof vents, damaged soffits, gaps in the cornice work, and openings where the roof meets the walls. Older brownstones often have deteriorated fascia boards or holes near the roofline that squirrels exploit. Tree branches touching the roof also provide easy access for these agile climbers.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Crown Heights humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, legal methods for squirrel removal in Crown Heights. Our approach includes live trapping and relocation when appropriate, one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to leave but not return, and complete sealing of entry points. We follow all NYC wildlife regulations and prioritize the welfare of the animals while protecting your property.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Crown Heights property?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Crown Heights service calls within 24 hours for inspections. The removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. Once all squirrels are removed, we complete exclusion work immediately to prevent re-entry. Emergency same-day service is available for urgent situations.
